summary: Verified bug fixes in BlendLink orphan management system at /admin/orphans. MongoDB query fix working - eligible_parents now shows 15 (was 0 before). All backend APIs functioning correctly. Frontend loads without JS errors when authenticated. 11-tier priority system fully operational.

issues: WebSocket analytics connection returns 403 (pre-existing issue, not blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: MongoDB query correctly uses $or for last_activity OR last_login_at fields
safeFetch response cloning works correctly when authenticated
11-tier priority system correctly implemented with round-robin
Max 2 orphans per user cap enforced
Batch assign button correctly disabled when no unassigned orphans
seed_data_creation: None required - tested with existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) MongoDB query fixed to use $or for last_activity OR last_login_at - eligible_parents now shows 15 instead of 0. 2) All 91 orphans have been assigned. 3) Re-run Auto-Assign button is correctly disabled when unassigned=0. All backend APIs work correctly when authenticated. Frontend loads properly after admin login.

verified_bug_fixes.mongodb_query_fix: VERIFIED - eligible_parents count now shows 15 (was 0 before fix)
verified_bug_fixes.body_stream_error: NOT REPRODUCIBLE when authenticated - error only appears on unauthenticated 401 responses
verified_bug_fixes.eligible_parents_display: VERIFIED - 15 users shown in Eligible Parents tab with tier info

api_tests_summary.GET /api/admin/orphans/potential-parents: 200 OK - returns 10+ parents with tier info
api_tests_summary.GET /api/admin/orphans: 200 OK - returns 91 orphans with tier badges
